LanguageData.Ammo_40x46mmGrenade_FleshBreaker.label: 40x46mm grenade (flesh-breaker)

LanguageData.Ammo_50mmRocket_FleshBreaker.label: 50mm rocket (flesh-breaker)
LanguageData.Ammo_50mmRocket_FleshBreaker.description: An unguided rocket equipped with an explosive warhead and a contact fuse.
LanguageData.Bullet_50mmRocket_FleshBreaker.label: 50mm rocket (flesh-breaker)
